title: Fees and court costs
doc_html:
§1034.  Fees and court costs

The program shall be exempt from the payment of filing fees or taxing of court costs in connection with any judicial proceeding related to its performance of program services for indigent adults.  

Acts 1992, No. 820, §1, eff. July 8, 1992.
doc_text:
§1034.  Fees and court costs
The program shall be exempt from the payment of filing fees or taxing of court costs in connection with any judicial proceeding related to its performance of program services for indigent adults.
Acts 1992, No. 820, §1, eff. July 8, 1992.
